default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Marcel Santilli's potential speaking roles at the upcoming AI User Group Automators event.](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The AI User Group is hosting a one-day Automators event on October 4th focused on AI automation for marketing, sales, and customer support](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Marcel will deliver a 50-minute workshop titled "Unlocking Chrome: Mastering AI-led Go-to-Market" based on previous successful presentations](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [There is potential for Marcel to also have a main stage speaking slot or participate in a panel discussion](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Marcel offered to help promote the event through social media posts and leveraging his network](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)

## Topics

### AI User Group & Automators Event

  - [AI User Group has 6,500+ members, hosting monthly events for marketers, designers, developers](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Automators is a one-day event on Oct 4th at Fort Mason Center focused on AI automation](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Tracks for main stage talks, booths, breakout workshops across marketing/sales/customer support](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Practical, workflow-focused content resonates well with this community](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

### Marcel's Workshop

  - [50-minute workshop: "Unlocking Chrome: Mastering AI-led Go-to-Market"](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Successful previous versions at client events, very hands-on with demos](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Covers rethinking marketing/growth workflows and mental models with AI assistants](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### Potential Main Stage Talk

  - ["AI-Powered Marketing/Growth" theme - rethinking marketing with AI, call to action](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Based on popular posts/presentations Marcel has done, very thought-provoking](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Sinead to review agenda and see if a unique slot is available](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

### Panel Discussion

  - [Potential to have Marcel on a panel, e.g. with Zapier CEO](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Important the panel is practitioner-focused vs. high-level executive views](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sinead to confirm Marcel's workshop details and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Sinead to explore potential for a main stage talk by Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Sinead to follow up on panel discussion option if main stage slot doesn't work](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Marcel to provide any additional details needed for the workshop](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Marcel to help promote the event through his network](https://fathom.video/share/cvbRpC6oE2zvzngxMnsmSDNsj2hKay9E?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)

action_items.description: Post on social media to promote Automators event using provided discount code
Inform Marcel Santilli of timeline, details, and any changes for his speaking spots at Automators event
